description: Official letter in Arabic script. Fragment (upper left piece). The addressee is an amīr with various titles including [...] al-salāṭīn. Refers to a district (nāḥiya) known as [...] Ṭanāḥ(?). The content is difficult to read. On verso there are similar text blocks including one referring to a salary (? jāmakiyya) of an amīr, also mentioning the word Ṭanāḥ. On verso there is also a Hebrew poem. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
